message:
T6.3: Add probe fixture loader and update setup_workflow tests

This commit completes bead coding_agent_session_search-wdwc (T6.3: Source
probe/install tests -> real fixtures) by replacing manual HostProbeResult
construction with fixture-based data loading.

Changes to tests/util/mod.rs:
- Added load_probe_fixture(name) function to load JSON fixtures from
  tests/fixtures/sources/probe/{name}.json
- Added probe_fixtures module with convenience functions for common scenarios:
  - indexed_host(): Host with cass installed and indexed (847 sessions)
  - not_indexed_host(): Host with cass installed but not indexed
  - no_cass_host(): Host without cass (build-server fixture)
  - empty_index_host(): Host with cass but 0 sessions
  - unreachable_host(): Host that couldn't be reached via SSH
  - unknown_status_host(): Host where status couldn't be determined

Changes to tests/setup_workflow.rs:
- Removed direct HostProbeResult struct construction in tests
- Updated docstring to reflect fixture-based approach instead of mock SSH
- Modified setup_state_with_probe_results test to use no_cass_host() fixture
- Added new test setup_state_with_multiple_probe_results() that exercises
  multiple fixture scenarios (indexed, no_cass, unreachable)

This aligns with the no-mock policy by using real fixture data instead of
inline test data construction. The permanently allowlisted mock_system_info()
and mock_resources() functions in src/sources/install.rs remain unchanged
as they are fixture constructors for pure function testing.

Verified:
- All 59 setup_workflow tests pass
- validate_ci.sh --no-mock-only passes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
